title: Tapiq
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''tapiq''' was a thorn-shaped [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature that possessed a paralyzing venom that could disable a [[damutek]]'s security systems.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''

[[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]]
[[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]]
[[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
[[Category:Venomous and poisonous creatures]]
